metadata.name: Void and Reissue a Lost Vendor Check

description: A vendor reports that they never received a check that was mailed to them. The accountant needs to void the original check and reissue a new one.

nodes.task_description: Identify the original check in the system using the check number or invoice number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the record of the original payment.

nodes.task_description: Place a stop payment on the original check with the bank.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully issues a stop payment request.

nodes.task_description: Void the original check in the accounting system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully voids the payment, which reopens the original invoice.

nodes.task_description: Issue a new check for the same invoice and mail it to the vendor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent processes a new payment and generates a new check.
